name: decky-nonsteam-badges
description: Decky plugin to identify non-Steam games and display a badge on their library capsules

scripts.preinstall: node -e "const ua=process.env.npm_config_user_agent||''; let ok=/pnpm\/7\./.test(ua); if(!ok){try{const v=require('child_process').execSync('pnpm -v',{encoding:'utf8'}).trim(); ok=/^7\./.test(v);}catch{ok=false}} if(!ok){console.error('Please use pnpm v7 (corepack prepare pnpm@7.33.6 --activate) to keep lockfileVersion 6.0'); process.exit(1);} "
scripts.deps:install: corepack enable && corepack prepare pnpm@7.33.6 --activate && pnpm install

author: sebet
